name: Flight Centre Travel Group Limited
analysis: FLT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$11.9900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$12.4400, stop A$10.4841, target A$14.1259 (0.86:1) — then trail it.
